cards.title: Drug Effects & Nutrient Depletions
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Metformin → B12 depletion (monitor 6-monthly)
  • Statins → CoQ10 depletion (100–200 mg/day)
  • PPIs → Mg, B12, Fe, Ca depletion
  • ACE inhibitors → Zinc depletion

cards.title: Synergy Matrix
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Omega-3 + statins: Additive lipid lowering
  • Magnesium + Vitamin D: D requires Mg for activation
  • Curcumin + piperine: 20× bioavailability increase
  • Probiotics + antibiotics: Separate by 2h

cards.title: Drug Combinations & Deprescribing
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Beers Criteria highlights (elderly)
  • Anticholinergic burden scale
  • Deprescribing cascade recognition
  • Polypharmacy review framework (>5 drugs)
